creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #7)
> not sure how much of my original patch was used, but I can explain
> potential reasons for things if it was used in large part

Ah, I see, thank you. I used my original patch since that was already
tested and everything, but went through yours to see whether anything
was missing.

I *think* we are good, but if you notice anything please advise.
